## TRM1.4. Air traffic control pre-departure delay (PI#2) {#trm1.4.-air-traffic-control-pre-departure-delay-pi2 .Heading-2-TZ}

Delay in Zurich in 2025 decreased to 0.97 min/dep, 18% lower than 2024 value-- last year of RP3 -- of 1.18 min/dep.

Delay in Geneva in 2025 decreased to 0.39 min/dep, 15% lower than 2024 value-- last year of RP3 -- of 0.46 min/dep.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATC pre-departure delay across Member States and for which enough data is available in 2025 was 0.74 min/dep.
